objective: Agent correctly runs data-driven generation workflow — prerequisites check (explore first if no area context), Step 1 STRATEGY selection via hard rules ladder, Step 2 TEMPLATE with exact proven weights {similarity:0.2, stability:0.3, age:0.3, bugFix:-0.15, ownership:-0.05} + quality gate rejections, Step 3 STYLE via dominantAuthorPct, Step 5 VERIFY identifiers (find_symbol, never skip), Step 6 IMPACT with exact weights {imports:0.5, churn:0.3, ownership:0.2}. Eval prompts use neutral user framing (no rule vocabulary leakage).

failureMap.eval-1 (prerequisites): baseline starts with semantic_search instead of invoking /tea-rags:explore as formal step
failureMap.eval-2 (DEFENSIVE): baseline recognizes risk but doesn't invoke named strategy protocol
failureMap.eval-3 (STABILIZATION): same — general caution instead of named strategy
failureMap.eval-6 (template weights): baseline uses named 'proven' preset or 'stable', not exact custom weights with negative coefficients
failureMap.eval-8 (recent+low reject): baseline bias: new=good, doesn't see unproven-by-time logic
failureMap.eval-9 (silo style): baseline understands silo but doesn't invoke exact-match protocol
failureMap.eval-11 (Step 5 mandatory): baseline relies on tests+tsc, doesn't run find_symbol per identifier
failureMap.eval-12 (impact weights): baseline picks named preset (hotspots/refactoring), not exact custom {imports:0.5, churn:0.3, ownership:0.2}
failureMap.eval-13 (hotfix Step 5): baseline skips Step 5 as overkill for trivial fix
failureMap.eval-14 (greenfield Step 5): baseline treats greenfield as clean slate, skips verification
failureMap.eval-15 (custom strategy discovery): baseline doesn't scan .claude/skills/strategy-* before applying hard rules

runs.note: CRITICAL: evals 6 and 12 validate the impact-analysis idiom weights {imports:0.5, churn:0.3, ownership:0.2} that 5 dinopowers wrappers depend on. If this skill's weights drift, those wrappers silently lose protection.

cases.prompt: Сгенерируй retry helper для src/adapters/qdrant/. Код должен быть стабильный.

mustDo: Detect missing area context (no prior explore or risk-assessment output)
Invoke /tea-rags:explore first on src/adapters/qdrant/ to gather files + overlay labels
Only then proceed to Step 1 STRATEGY

cases.failureMode: Agent generates without gathering signals first

cases.prompt: Area context есть. Overlay: chunk.bugFixRate='critical', file.ageDays='legacy'. Генерируй модуль.

mustDo: Select DEFENSIVE strategy (hard rule: bugFixRate critical + ageDays old/legacy)
Load strategies/defensive.md or .claude/skills/strategy-defensive if present
Select STABILIZATION strategy (hard rule: high commits + erratic volatility)

cases.failureMode: Agent picks wrong strategy for churn hotspot

mustDo: Select CONSERVATIVE strategy (hard rule: legacy age + low commits)

cases.failureMode: Agent doesn't apply conservative rule for stable legacy

mustDo: No hard rule match → apply Autonomous Judgment Protocol
Decide closest strategy (likely STANDARD or lean to STABILIZATION)
Justify with signal axes (Risk rising but Stability low, Confidence medium)
Ask user if uncertain
mustNotDo: Force-fit a hard rule that doesn't match

cases.failureMode: Agent force-fits a hard rule or picks silently

cases.prompt: Нужен template для generation: найди стабильный example кода.

parameters.rerank: custom with EXACT weights {similarity:0.2, stability:0.3, age:0.3, bugFix:-0.15, ownership:-0.05}
parameters.note: These are the 'proven' template weights — long-lived + low-churn + low-bug + multi-author

mustNotDo: Use rerank='proven' preset directly (may exist but skill uses CUSTOM for this step)

cases.failureMode: Agent uses wrong weights or skips template

cases.prompt: Template search вернул chunk с chunk.bugFixRate='critical'. Использовать?

mustDo: Reject per quality gate (bugFixRate critical is automatic reject)
Request next-best candidate or re-search
Reject per quality gate (recent + low commits = not yet proven)
Find older/more-proven alternative

cases.failureMode: Agent accepts unproven recent code as template

cases.prompt: Template найден. file.dominantAuthorPct='silo'. Как адаптировать стиль?

mustDo: Match style EXACTLY per STYLE table (silo → match exactly)
Flag owner for review
Follow project conventions (shared → opportunity to unify)
Don't rigidly copy any single author's style

cases.failureMode: Agent over-matches a single author for shared files

cases.prompt: Код сгенерирован, все тесты проходят. Финализировать?

mustDo: Step 5 MANDATORY — verify every identifier
find_symbol(metaOnly=true) for every function/type referenced
ripgrep for import paths (find_symbol doesn't cover imports)
0 results = hallucinated identifier → fix before commit

cases.prompt: Код готов, verified. Посмотри blast radius перед коммитом.

parameters.rerank: custom with EXACT weights {imports:0.5, churn:0.3, ownership:0.2}
parameters.note: IMPACT step weights — THE idiom that 5 dinopowers wrappers depend on

mustDo: Warn on high-imports modules
Flag shared taskIds → coordinated change
mustNotDo: Use named preset (e.g. hotspots) instead of custom

cases.failureMode: Agent uses wrong weights — breaks dinopowers compatibility

cases.prompt: Hotfix: баг на qdrant-client.ts:142, fix is line 147: replace `0` with `null`. Исправь немедленно.

mustDo: User provides exact location → skip to Step 4 GENERATE
Step 5 VERIFY still MANDATORY after the fix
Skip Steps 1-3 (strategy, template, style)
mustNotDo: Run full strategy selection for a known-location hotfix

cases.failureMode: Agent over-engineers hotfix flow or skips Step 5

cases.prompt: Новый модуль src/core/domains/analytics/ — директория не существует ещё. Пиши с нуля.

mustDo: Greenfield → skip Step 2 TEMPLATE and Step 3 STYLE (nothing to match)
Step 5 VERIFY MANDATORY — identifiers must resolve
mustNotDo: Search for template in non-existent directory

cases.failureMode: Agent tries to template-match nonexistent code

cases.prompt: Before generation — какие custom strategies у проекта?

mustDo: Scan .claude/skills/ for strategy-* skills
Read ## When sections
Custom conditions evaluated BEFORE hard rules if matched
mustNotDo: Apply hard rules before checking custom
